creator: trevis@silencedpoet.com
text:
When installing the py3-iocage port, with the default python3 set to 3.6 as per the project README (at https://github.com/iocage/iocage/blob/master/README.md ) an error about missing git occurs when running
># iocage list -P

I documented this further at https://github.com/iocage/iocage/issues/125


Lastly, I would submit a PR for this (just adding git to the dependencies), but the docs seem to be failing me as to where that actually lives/how the process works. Looking at all of the following and I'm still missing it:

* https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/articles/contributing/ports-contributing.html

* https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/


Thank you for the time,

Trevis
